title: German Beef Skillet
description: A hearty German-inspired dish made with ground beef, charred onions, and a blend of spices. Serve with a side of bread or potatoes for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the charred onions, salt, black pepper, paprika, and garlic powder to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the onions are caramelized and the beef is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
